map_scope_note: The Hampden County outline is used as the local reference area. Future observed activity may include regional points outside Hampden County.
source_note: Observed activity may eventually come from permitted public feeds, local observer logs, MQTT data, analyzers, or community reports.
ownership_note: Observed activity does not imply ownership, operation, endorsement, or control by Hampden County Mesh.
privacy_note: Exact private node locations should be omitted or generalized before publication.
